title: 12pcs 3cm Christmas Bauble Silver Christmas Tree Decoration Mirror Xmas Hanging Ornaments Mirror Disco Balls for Xmas Party Decoration
features: Package: You will get 12pcs Christmas Baubles Ornaments, enough quantity to choose, you can better carry out Christmas decoration, bring a strong atmosphere for your holiday.

Premium Material: Hanging Christmas balls are made of high quality plastic, lightweight material, can be easily hung on the Christmas tree, don’t worry about bending the branches, compared with the glass material is not easy to break, it’s the ideal Christmas decoration.
Unique Design: The glitter on the surface of the Christmas ball is more beautiful under the lights, creating a strong festive atmosphere and attracting the attention of friends.

Easy to Use: Each plastic Christmas ball is tied to the top of the string, it can be directly hung on the Christmas tree or other places you want to decorate, very convenient, the package includes a transparent plastic box, when you do not need the Christmas balls can use the box to storage.

Widely Application: Christmas Baubles can be used for party decorations, as well as decorations in bedrooms, living rooms, farms, not only it’s the perfect complement to your holiday decorations, but it can also be given as a present to family and friends to enjoy the holiday fun with them.
